creator: rootrider@shellfront.org
text:
After creating this bug I thought about it more and I think this was an issue with my last upgrade as well. So it's possible that this has been around for longer.

I'm also seeing my /var/virusmails ($QUARANTINEDIR) and /var/amavis ($MYHOME) directory structures being changed back to 'root' user and group ownership, away from my 'amavis' users. I have to manually change the ownership back to my amavis user/group in order for amavisd-new to work again.
